creator: fbsdbug@edcrowe.com
text:
(In reply to Jason W. Bacon from comment #6)
Hi Jason,
    In the comments from this forum post, there is a zip file with a macOS binary that will dump the SMC key/values:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/macbook7-1-asmc-support.76497/
From what I remember it is really slow, but does work. Give it time.

   I also just saw this, but never tried it: 
https://github.com/dkorunic/iSMC
